Description.value: Aligns Sleep Overhaul's allowed sleep window with Byteblazar's Singularity / Advanced Sky Manager night cycle. (1) Harmony Prefix on BedrollUtil.IsWithinSleepWindow extends allowed hours from 20:00-02:00 to 20:00-05:00. (2) Transpiler on XUiC_TFDSleepDialog raises the dialog hour clamp from 1-8 to 1-12 across all five clamp sites. (3) Transpiler on BedrollPatches.HandleSleepPrefix replaces the radial command's hardcoded 8 with a dynamic 'until dawn' calculation. (4) Localization override for the time-window warning. Pure Harmony + Localization, EAC must be off.
